ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate record */,
  "anomaly_rainfall" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a rainfall anomaly */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the record (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month for the record */,
  "fcg" INTEGER /* Indicates if FCG (Food Crisis Gauge) is true */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities reported */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year for the record */,
  "ndvi" REAL /* Normalized Difference Vegetation Index value */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population in the area */,
  "cereal_price" REAL /* Price of cereals and tubers in local currency */,
  "rainfall_mm" REAL /* Total rainfall in millimeters */,
  "ramadan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the month is Ramadan */,
  "waterways" INTEGER /* Indicates if there are waterways present */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in the area */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity in the area */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed in the area */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crops grown in the area */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of parameters */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the model */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Max depth of the model's decision trees */,
  "min_child_weight" INTEGER /* Minimum child weight for the model */,
  "n_estimators" INTEGER /* Number of estimators used in the model */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma parameter for regularization */,
  "colsample_bytree" REAL /* Subsample ratio of columns for each tree */,
  "subsample" REAL /* Subsample ratio of the training instances */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameters were created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate data record */,
  "r2_train" REAL /* R-squared value for training data */,
  "r2_val" REAL /* R-squared value for validation data */,
  "loss_to_minimize" REAL /* Loss value to minimize during training */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the model parameters table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the datasets table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude_min" REAL /* Minimum latitude of the region */,
  "latitude_max" REAL /* Maximum latitude of the region */,
  "longitude_min" REAL /* Minimum longitude of the region */,
  "longitude_max" REAL /* Maximum longitude of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "record_count" INTEGER /* Number of records in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., satellite, ground sensors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the datasets table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the regions table */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
